title: Update `dtk-template`
author: ribbanya
body: @r-burns What about just using your patch of wibo?

title: Update `dtk-template`
author: r-burns
body: That works too, this seemed easier. Do we actually need anything from recent releases of wibo? I've been happily pinned to 0.7.0.
